location: Ancient Ruins of Rauh, on a rock amid a grove northwest of the Rauh Ancient Ruins, East Site of Grace. Dropped by the miniboss Crucible Knight Devonia, who can be found standing atop the rock.
tactics: Devonia can be snuck past to light the Rauh Ancient Ruins, East grace first if you want a fallback point before fighting her.
Her moveset centers on a spinning vortex attack (mirrored by her own weapon skill, Devonia's Vortex) plus heavy hammer slams — punish once the spin finishes rather than mid-animation.
She's one of several similarly-armored Crucible Knights scattered through the DLC (e.g. Ordovis), so don't mix up her fight location with the others.
Defeating her also drops the Crucible Hammer-Helm, which boosts this weapon's skill damage by 4% when worn.
lore: Belonging to Devonia, longest-serving of the Crucible Knights, this hammer is cast from primordial gold rather than ordinary steel, giving it a reddish sheen and a lingering holy aura. Its striking face bears an engraving evoking a flowing current of life.

builds.name: Strength/Faith Holy Colossal
builds.why: Strength (C) supplies the bulk of its physical attack power while Faith (D) adds a meaningful holy damage bonus, rewarding a quality-leaning STR/FAI build.
